project_type: Android app with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Hilt DI, and llama.cpp JNI native inference
build_system: Gradle (build.gradle.kts) - cannot run in sandbox due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network
test_framework: No unit tests exist in the project currently
verification_instructions: Verify code compiles by checking Kotlin syntax consistency. Gradle build cannot run in this sandbox.
setup_instructions: Requires Android SDK, NDK for native lib builds. Native .so files are pre-built in app/src/main/jniLibs/
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external access. Cannot run Gradle, cannot download dependencies. Validation limited to code review and syntax checking.
key_patterns: Hilt DI with @Singleton, OkHttp for network, Flow-based repository pattern, coroutines, Compose UI. Repository emits Flow<List<ModelInfo>> for remote models and Flow<DownloadState> for downloads. LlamaCppEngineImpl wraps JNI bridge to llama.cpp native library.
directory_structure: Standard Android project: app/src/main/java/com/localai/ with data/, domain/, presentation/, di/ layers. Native JNI in app/src/main/jni/. Pre-built .so in app/src/main/jniLibs/{arm64-v8a,x86_64}/. Stale broken symlinks in app/src/main/JniLibs/ (uppercase J).
